articles.title: Allstate names the most collision-prone cities in the U.S.
articles.description:
Boston and two other Massachusetts cities landed on the list, along with Rhode Island's capital.

The post Allstate names the most collision-prone cities in the U.S. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston ranked among the most collision-prone cities in the U.S. according to Allstate.
Two other Massachusetts cities also made the list, highlighting statewide traffic concerns.
Increased accidents may lead to higher insurance rates for Boston residents.
